options.name: -acquireLicense
options.description: Get the specified number of multi cpu licenses

options.name: -autoPageFaultMonitor
options.description: Set the warning rank for performance issue caused by page fault (default=0)

options.name: -cpuPerRemoteHost
options.description: Number of CPUs available on every remote host (server)

options.name: -gpuPerRemoteHost
options.description: Number of GPUs available on every remote host (server)

options.name: -keepLicense
options.description: Set a flag to indicate whether the multicpu license should be kept or not

options.name: -licenseList
options.description: Specify the list/order of licenses the tool should use for multi cpu operations

options.name: -localCpu
options.description: Number of available local CPUs (for distribution or threading)

options.name: -localGpu
options.description: Number of available local GPUs (for distribution or threading)

options.name: -localMem
options.description: Memory in MB available local GPUs (for distribution or threading)

options.name: -memPerRemoteHost
options.description: Memory in MB available on every remote host (server)

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Provide verbose messages when changing the settings
